name: feature.strategy.agents
description: Strategy feature agent pack (ADR 0080 / ADR 0079 / ADR 0014) — a manifest agent whose tools are feature.strategy.nodes over the ctx.features.strategy surface. The Strategy Analyst audits alignment gaps across the strategy portfolio and drafts board-ready memos from the AI chat. Tool-allowlisted to the Strategy feature surface only; the strategy surface is read-only (its only write is a board-memo Document).
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Strategy Analyst
agents.description: Audits the strategy portfolio for alignment gaps (strategies with no linked execution, objectives with no key results, off-track linked projects, owner-less initiatives) and drafts board-ready memos — grounded via feature.strategy.nodes over ctx.features.strategy. Recommends and drafts; the human decides and authors strategy. It never mutates strategy data.
